name: Line of Business
description: 8 local lines of business in JPY. Data owner: AsiaRe Head of Actuarial. Updated quarterly; mapping submissions due 60 days before fiscal year start.

content.description:
AsiaRe maintains 8 local lines of business denominated in JPY. Each LoB maps to the [10 Group Lines of Business](/FutuRe/LineOfBusiness) via percentage splits defined in the [AsiaRe Mapping Rules](/FutuRe/AsiaRe/TransactionMapping/MappingRules).

**Data Owner:** AsiaRe Head of Actuarial

**SLOs:**
- **Data freshness:** Cashflows updated quarterly, within 5 business days of quarter close
- **Mapping submission deadline:** 60 days before fiscal year start
- **Approval cycle:** Local actuarial review within 10 business days, then [Group Actuarial](/FutuRe/LineOfBusiness) approval
- **Percentage integrity:** All splits must sum to 100% per local LoB

**Responsibilities:**
- Local actuaries maintain LoB definitions and cashflow data
- Local actuaries propose mapping changes to [Group standard](/FutuRe/LineOfBusiness)
- Finance team validates P&L aggregation in the [Analysis Cube](/FutuRe/AsiaRe/Analysis/AnnualReport)
- Contact: asiare-actuarial@future-group.com
